faq.q: How many GCC centers does Barco operate in India?
faq.a: Barco operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Barco have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Barco's India GCC presence is in Noida.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Barco run in India?
faq.a: Barco runs CoE centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Barco's India GCCs?
faq.a: Barco's India centers employ in the 201 to 500 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Barco's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 54 leaders at Barco's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.
